subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One beareth witness in the Most Great Prison that there is none other God but Him, and that He Who hath appeared is indeed the Promised One in the Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم فی السجن الاعظم انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر لهو الموعود فی کتب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
